title: Zomato Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Zomato Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zomato Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Zomato Digital Technologies:
Zomato Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Digital Technologies!
